text:
(In reply to Poul-Henning Kamp from comment #0)
(In reply to Poul-Henning Kamp from comment #0)

Thanks for the report. I myself moved on to audio/abcde a long while ago, but tried  to keep this port alive, even after upstream disappeared years ago.

I just dusted off my CD drive and I have to admit, taht it seems to be the time to let it go.
